scripts.find:lines:300: sh -c "find src -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.html' -o -name '*.json' -o -name '*.md' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 wc -l | awk '$1 > 300 {print $1 "\t" $2}'"
scripts.find:lines:500: sh -c "find src -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.html' -o -name '*.json' -o -name '*.md' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 wc -l | awk '$1 > 500 {print $1 "\t" $2}'"
scripts.find:lines:800: sh -c "find src -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.html' -o -name '*.json' -o -name '*.md' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 wc -l | awk '$1 > 800 {print $1 "\t" $2}'"
scripts.find:indent:3: find src -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.html' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 -I{} node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const f=process.argv[1]; const s=fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8").replace(/\t/g,"  "); const max=s.split("\n").reduce((m,l)=>Math.max(m,(l.match(/^[ \t]*/)||[""])[0].length),0); const layers=Math.floor((max+1)/2); if(layers>3) console.log(layers+"\t"+f);' {}
scripts.find:indent:5: find src -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.html' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 -I{} node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const f=process.argv[1]; const s=fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8").replace(/\t/g,"  "); const max=s.split("\n").reduce((m,l)=>Math.max(m,(l.match(/^[ \t]*/)||[""])[0].length),0); const layers=Math.floor((max+1)/2); if(layers>5) console.log(layers+"\t"+f);' {}
scripts.find:indent:7: find src -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.css' -o -name '*.html' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 -I{} node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const f=process.argv[1]; const s=fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8").replace(/\t/g,"  "); const max=s.split("\n").reduce((m,l)=>Math.max(m,(l.match(/^[ \t]*/)||[""])[0].length),0); const layers=Math.floor((max+1)/2); if(layers>7) console.log(layers+"\t"+f);' {}
